# INAddMediaMediaDestinationUnsupportedReason.playlistNameNotFound

**Case**

The app was unable to find a playlist with that name.

## Declaration

```swift
case playlistNameNotFound
```

## Reasons

- **INAddMediaMediaDestinationUnsupportedReason.playlistNotEditable**: The user can’t modify the destination playlist.

items.description: The user can’t modify the destination playlist.
items.name: INAddMediaMediaDestinationUnsupportedReason.playlistNotEditable
